benefits.description: Water retention from MK-677 helps with joint pain during cutting phase

side_effects.description: Water retention from MK-677 but user finds it beneficial for joints. Does not look 'cracked out' as water retention adds fullness to appearance.

protocol_notes: User prefers some water retention during cutting phase as it helps joints and improves appearance. Mitigation strategies that helped: extra potassium and magnesium supplementation, splitting carbs throughout day rather than in large chunks. Notes that IGF-1 levels stay elevated longer than GH half-life; every-other-day dosing maintains elevated IGF-1 levels. Also mentions water retention and subcutaneous fat 'fullness' does not affect actual fat loss, only scale weight and appearance.
